title: Pilgrimage and Governors
description: In this year, Ibrahim b. Hisham led the pilgrimage. This is what I heard from Ahmad b. Thabit-his informantIshaq b. Isa--Abu Ma'shar. Al-Wagidi, Hisham, 135 and others said likewise. The governors of the major provinces in this year were the same as those whom we mentioned before in the year io6.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
